# MuleSoft RPA Builder

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (6.7) of RPA Builder documentation.
> See [RPA Builder llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/rpa-builder/llms-full.txt) for all the RPA Builder documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Activity Library Explorer](https://docs.mulesoft.com/rpa-builder/latest/activity-library-explorer.md)
